projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts. Next: read chip XID 0x40 + variant init.
blockers: RTL8168 RX blocked — chip fires zero RX interrupts, DHCP times out

projects.name: Wraith Browser
projects.handoff_excerpt: Hosted Corpo API live at https://wraith-browser.vercel.app and direct VPS at 207.244.232.227:8080. AGPL repo + proprietary api-server tier both deploying clean. FR queue cleared except cross-repo FR-4.
blockers: No free hostname picked for Caddy/TLS — Vercel rewrites cover REST but WebSocket upgrades + cleartext Vercel→VPS leg need real TLS on the VPS
FR-4 cross-repo wraith-transport bridge pending ClaudioOS session

projects.name: Antcolony (PvP pivot)
projects.handoff_excerpt: Session 2026-05-08: cross-OS smoke test against pixie VPS — TCP path GREEN end-to-end over real internet (~90ms handshake), but Windows-to-Linux sim determinism RED. State hashes diverge within 5 sim ticks (kokonoe 0x14494faf24a1499 vs pixie 0x3e46e1e70b8a5ef0). Same source, same seed, same arena. Suspected root cause: f32 transcendentals (sin/cos/sqrt/powf) using platform libm (Microsoft CRT vs glibc) differ by 1-2 ulps.
milestones_hit: TCP path verified end-to-end across the public internet between kokonoe (Win) and pixie VPS (Linux) — handshake + protocol exchange GREEN
blockers: Cross-OS sim determinism RED — Win-to-Linux/Proton-GE PvP broken until libm-port audit lands. Win-to-Win LAN/Tailscale PvP still fine. Mixed-OS lobbies cannot ship until fixed.

strategic_events.detail: Antcolony PvP cross-internet smoke test: TCP transport verified end-to-end between kokonoe (Win) and pixie VPS (Linux, 207.244.232.227:17001) — handshake + protocol exchange GREEN over the public internet.

Antcolony cross-OS sim determinism RED — f32 transcendental drift (Microsoft CRT vs glibc libm) desyncs Win↔Linux peers within 5 sim ticks. Mixed-OS lobbies cannot ship until libm-port audit lands. Win↔Win PvP unaffected.

Engineering decision queued: replace f32::sin/cos/sqrt/powf in antcolony sim hot path with libm crate (pure-Rust port) for bit-identical cross-OS results. Estimated ~3h audit + replacement, ~1.2× perf cost on transcendentals.

notes: Same uploader pattern as previous days: nearly every repo has a single 'Initial commit - uploaded via github-uploader-buildout' commit timestamped today (CT=1, LT=2). These are automated repo-init churn from Matt's github-uploader job, not real activity — commits_today/lines_changed_today set to 0 for those repos. Only real today-activity: antcolony (1 substantive HANDOFF commit, 55 LOC, documenting the cross-internet smoke test result). Health harvest intentionally omitted — handled on-device by iOS app via HealthKit. Client harvest skipped — no Gmail/Calendar connector on kokonoe.
